Account

Tools

Manage MCP tool servers that your AI agents use. Entrata tools are available based on your contracted products. Add custom MCP servers for additional capabilities.

20/22

Entrata tools

enabled

6/7

Entrata modules

contracted

0

Custom servers

5

Require approval

tools

Entrata MCP tools organized by product module. Contracted modules are available to your agents. Toggle individual tools on or off, and mark high-risk tools as requiring human approval before execution.

Leasing & CRM
Contracted
4/4 tools enabled
Lead capture, tour scheduling, availability queries, and prospect management.
Contracted
ToolDescriptionRiskApprovalEnabled

Create Lead

entrata/leads/create
Create or update a prospect lead record
medium

Schedule Tour

entrata/tours/schedule
Book a tour for a prospect at a specific property and time
medium

Get Availability

entrata/availability/get
Query available units filtered by property, floor plan, and date
low

Get Floor Plans

entrata/floor_plans/get
Retrieve floor plan details, pricing, and unit counts
low
Applications & Screening
Contracted
3/3 tools enabled
Application processing, applicant management, and tenant screening.
Contracted
ToolDescriptionRiskApprovalEnabled

Get Application

entrata/applications/get
Retrieve application details and status by applicant or unit
low

Create Application

entrata/applications/create
Initiate a new rental application for a prospect
medium

Run Screening

entrata/screening/run
Execute background and credit screening for an applicant
high
Lease Management
Contracted
3/3 tools enabled
Lease lifecycle — lookups, renewals, document generation, and term enforcement.
Contracted
ToolDescriptionRiskApprovalEnabled

Get Lease

entrata/leases/get
Retrieve lease details for a unit or resident
low

Renew Lease

entrata/leases/renew
Generate a renewal offer with updated terms and pricing
high

Send Lease Document

entrata/leases/send_document
Send lease agreement to resident for electronic signature
high
Resident Services
Contracted
3/3 tools enabled
Resident data lookups, contact information, and search.
Contracted
ToolDescriptionRiskApprovalEnabled

Get Resident

entrata/residents/get
Retrieve full resident profile and lease history
low

Get Contact Info

entrata/residents/get_contact
Look up resident phone, email, and mailing address
low

Search Residents

entrata/residents/search
Search residents by name, unit, or property
low
Work Orders
Contracted
3/3 tools enabled
Maintenance request lifecycle — creation, updates, status tracking, and vendor dispatch.
Contracted
ToolDescriptionRiskApprovalEnabled

Create Work Order

entrata/work_orders/create
Submit a new maintenance work order with unit, type, and description
medium

Get Work Order

entrata/work_orders/get
Retrieve work order details and current status
low

Update Work Order

entrata/work_orders/update
Update status, priority, or assignment on an existing work order
medium
Payments & Accounting
Contracted
4/4 tools enabled
Balance inquiries, payment history, ledger entries, and fee management.
Contracted
ToolDescriptionRiskApprovalEnabled

Get Balance

entrata/payments/get_balance
Retrieve current balance and outstanding charges for a resident
low

Get Payment History

entrata/payments/get_history
Look up payment transaction history for a resident or unit
low

Post Ledger Entry

entrata/payments/post_ledger
Post a charge, credit, or adjustment to a resident ledger
high

Waive Fee

entrata/payments/waive_fee
Waive a late fee or other charge on a resident account
high
Communications
Not contracted
Resident notifications, marketing preferences, and bulk messaging.
Contracted
